tool.name: get_file_tree
tool.description: Return nested file tree for Code Workbench panel. Skips node_modules / .git / __pycache__ etc. Caps at 5000 entries, max_depth default 4.

parameter.name: path
parameter.description: Relative to /workspace, or absolute. Empty = workspace root.

tool.name: read_workspace_file
tool.description: Read a file under /workspace. 2MB cap. Binary files return metadata only.

tool.name: write_workspace_file
tool.description: Write content to a workspace file. Creates parent dirs. Used by Workbench editor to save edits.

tool.name: search_workspace_files
tool.description: Grep-style search across workspace. Skips binary files, supports regex, case sensitivity, glob filter, context lines.
